nasb.text: and He overthrew those cities, and all the valley, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and what grew on the ground.

esv.text: And he overthrew those cities, and all the valley, and all the inhabitants of the cities, and what grew on the ground.

cnv.text: 把那些城和全平原，以及城中所有的居民，連地上生長的，都毀滅了。

ccb.text: 毁灭了这两座城和其中的居民，包括整个平原和地上的植物。

csbs.text: 使那些城和整个平原，连同各城所有的居民和地上生长的都遭覆灭。
